description: Slot-swap: Persona-slot vs Instructions-slot for procedural distributed systems content
notes: Slot-swap experiment: falsification test for the consideration-set mechanism. Variant I = original P_p (procedural content in Persona slot, 10/10 in exp-01e). Variant J = original P_d baseline (generic Persona, 0/10 in exp-01e). Variant C = slot-swap (generic Persona + same procedural content moved to Instructions slot). If C matches I: Persona slot is not special; content drives detection. If C matches J: identity framing matters; the slot is load-bearing. Same zombie-write scenario, same binary criterion, same model and temperature as exp-01e.
